title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Project Research Scientist I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation can use this chance and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 .
